ra.name: Ra
ra.body: When drawn, placed on the Ra track (not auction track). Triggers an involuntary auction immediately. If the Ra track fills, the epoch ends.
ra.details: If no one bids on a Ra-triggered auction, all tiles on the auction track are discarded from the game.

pharaoh.name: Pharaoh
pharaoh.body: Collected for majority scoring each epoch. Most pharaohs: +5 VP. Fewest: -2 VP.
pharaoh.details: Kept between epochs. Your pharaoh collection grows over the game.

gold.name: Gold
gold.body: Worth 3 VP each at the end of every epoch. Discarded after scoring.
gold.details: Simple, reliable points. Good filler in auction lots.

god.name: God
god.body: Spend on your turn to take any single tile from the auction track (instead of drawing or calling Ra). Unspent God tiles are worth 2 VP each at end of game.
god.details: Flexible: use for tactical advantage during the game, or hold for guaranteed end-game VP.

nile.name: Nile
nile.body: Score 1 VP each at epoch scoring, but ONLY if you have at least one Flood tile. Without Flood, Nile tiles score nothing.
nile.details: Kept between epochs. Your Nile collection grows, making Floods increasingly important.

flood.name: Flood
flood.body: Activates Nile scoring. Each Flood tile also scores 1 VP. Discarded after each epoch's scoring.
flood.details: You must collect new Floods each epoch to score your Nile tiles. Losing Floods to Drought is devastating.

civilization_agriculture.name: Civilization: Agriculture
civilization_agriculture.body: One of 5 civilization types. Scored by distinct types collected: 0=-5, 3=+5, 4=+10, 5=+15 VP. All discarded each epoch.
civilization_agriculture.details: Must rebuild your civilization set every epoch.

civilization_art.name: Civilization: Art
civilization_art.body: One of 5 civilization types. Scored by distinct types collected: 0=-5, 3=+5, 4=+10, 5=+15 VP. All discarded each epoch.
civilization_art.details: Must rebuild your civilization set every epoch.

civilization_astronomy.name: Civilization: Astronomy
civilization_astronomy.body: One of 5 civilization types. Scored by distinct types collected: 0=-5, 3=+5, 4=+10, 5=+15 VP. All discarded each epoch.
civilization_astronomy.details: Must rebuild your civilization set every epoch.

civilization_religion.name: Civilization: Religion
civilization_religion.body: One of 5 civilization types. Scored by distinct types collected: 0=-5, 3=+5, 4=+10, 5=+15 VP. All discarded each epoch.
civilization_religion.details: Must rebuild your civilization set every epoch.

civilization_writing.name: Civilization: Writing
civilization_writing.body: One of 5 civilization types. Scored by distinct types collected: 0=-5, 3=+5, 4=+10, 5=+15 VP. All discarded each epoch.
civilization_writing.details: Must rebuild your civilization set every epoch.

monument_fortress.name: Monument: Fortress
monument_fortress.body: One of 8 monument types. Only scored at end of game. Variety: 1-6 types = VP equals count, 7=10, 8=15 VP. Quantity: 3x=5, 4x=10, 5x=15 VP.
monument_fortress.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_obelisk.name: Monument: Obelisk
monument_obelisk.body: One of 8 monument types. Only scored at end of game. Variety: 1-6 types = VP equals count, 7=10, 8=15 VP. Quantity: 3x=5, 4x=10, 5x=15 VP.
monument_obelisk.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_palace.name: Monument: Palace
monument_palace.body: One of 8 monument types. Only scored at end of game. Variety: 1-6 types = VP equals count, 7=10, 8=15 VP. Quantity: 3x=5, 4x=10, 5x=15 VP.
monument_palace.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_pyramid.name: Monument: Pyramid

monument_pyramid.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_sphinx.name: Monument: Sphinx

monument_sphinx.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_statue.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_step_pyramid.name: Monument: Step Pyramid
monument_step_pyramid.body: One of 8 monument types. Only scored at end of game. Variety: 1-6 types = VP equals count, 7=10, 8=15 VP. Quantity: 3x=5, 4x=10, 5x=15 VP.
monument_step_pyramid.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

monument_temple.name: Monument: Temple
monument_temple.body: One of 8 monument types. Only scored at end of game. Variety: 1-6 types = VP equals count, 7=10, 8=15 VP. Quantity: 3x=5, 4x=10, 5x=15 VP.
monument_temple.details: Kept between all epochs. Long-term investment.

disaster_funeral.name: Disaster: Funeral
disaster_funeral.body: When won in an auction, you must discard 2 Pharaoh tiles. If you have fewer than 2, discard what you have. The disaster tile is then removed from the game.
disaster_funeral.details: Consider whether the other tiles in the lot outweigh losing pharaohs before bidding.

disaster_drought.name: Disaster: Drought
disaster_drought.body: When won in an auction, you must discard 2 Nile or Flood tiles (your choice). If you have fewer than 2, discard what you have.
disaster_drought.details: Especially painful if you lose your only Flood tile, as your Nile tiles then score nothing.

disaster_unrest.name: Disaster: Unrest
disaster_unrest.body: When won in an auction, you must discard 1 Civilization tile of your choice.
disaster_unrest.details: Can disrupt your civilization set. Choose wisely which type to lose.

disaster_earthquake.name: Disaster: Earthquake
disaster_earthquake.body: When won in an auction, you must discard 1 Monument tile of your choice.
disaster_earthquake.details: Since monuments are kept all game, losing one is a permanent setback.
